title: MCP Trust Registry — Pin
description: Schema for a consumer-side pin per protocol v0.1 §8. A pin commits the consumer to a specific (manifest, artifact, granted capabilities) tuple. Capability expansion in a newer version requires explicit re-grant.

granted_capabilities.description: Capabilities the user explicitly granted at pin time. Subset of the manifest's required ∪ optional.

pinned_by.description: Optional human-readable identifier (username, agent id, etc.). Not used for trust decisions.

policy_hash.description: Hash of the policy in effect when the pin was created. Lets verifiers detect when a pin was made under different policy assumptions.
